mapper.select: SELECT role_idx FROM role ORDER BY role_idx ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET mem_is_deleted = 'Y', mem_deldate = NOW() WHERE mem_id = #{memId}
UPDATE member SET mem_name = #{memName}, mem_email = #{memEmail}, mem_tel = #{memTel}, mem_bday = #{memBday}, mem_pwd = #{memPwd} WHERE mem_id = #{memId}
mapper.select: SELECT g.grade_name FROM member m JOIN grade g ON m.mem_grade_idx = g.grade_idx WHERE m.mem_id = #{memId}
